detail: Unique identifier used for output folder naming

Native Species Forest - mature planted native broadleaf forest

value: Beijing Olympic Forest Park (680 ha) was established for the 2008 Summer Olympics. It is one of the largest urban parks in Beijing and features native broadleaf species. Key management challenges include managing high visitor pressure along trail corridors and controlling encroachment by non-native Robinia pseudoacacia. Park is temperate continental with hot humid summers and cold dry winters.
